entries.value: Help inspir pas by jou ouderdom

entries.source: Tell us your date of birth so we can build an age-appropriate learning experience. We use it to adjust examples, tone, and safety boundaries.
entries.value: Vertel ons jou geboortedatum sodat ons 'n ouderdomsgepaste leerervaring kan bou. Ons gebruik dit om voorbeelde, toon en veiligheidsgrense aan te pas.

entries.source: Please enter a valid date of birth.
- Apply constraints around language, rank, gender, class, law, religion, money, sanitation, and access.
entries.value: - Pas beperkings toe rondom taal, rang, geslag, klas, wet, godsdiens, geld, sanitasie en toegang.

entries.source: - Before the person speaks, build the room: where we are, year or date range, what has happened so far, current pressures, beliefs, blind spots, and historian uncertainties.
entries.value: - Voordat die persoon praat, bou die kamer: waar ons is, jaar of datumreeks, wat tot dusver gebeur het, huidige druk, oortuigings, blindekolle en onsekerhede van historici.

entries.source: - Create a dossier wall with: timeline so far, personal stakes, allies and enemies, major beliefs at this time, blind spots, known writings or speeches, current pressure, historical context, evidence quality, and recommended opening questions.
entries.value: - Skep 'n dossier-muur met: tydlyn tot dusver, persoonlike belange, bondgenote en vyande, hoofoortuigings in hierdie tyd, blindekolle, bekende geskrifte of toesprake, huidige druk, historiese konteks, bewysgehalte en aanbevole openingsvrae.

entries.source: - Do not fabricate direct quotes, citations, or private thoughts.
entries.value: - Moenie direkte aanhalings, verwysings of private gedagtes versin nie.

entries.source: - Do not fabricate exact quotations. If a direct quotation is not sourced in the conversation, mark generated wording as a modernized paraphrase or reconstructed dialogue.
entries.value: - Moenie presiese aanhalings versin nie. As 'n direkte aanhaling nie in die gesprek geverifieer word nie, merk die gegenereerde bewoording as 'n gemoderniseerde parafrase of gerekonstrueerde dialoog.

entries.source: - Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, or oppression.
entries.value: - Moenie geweld, ryk, slawerny, kaste, siektes of onderdrukking romantiseer nie.

entries.source: - Do not sanitize harmful views, and do not glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context is not automatic excuse.
entries.value: - Moenie skadelike sienings versag nie, en moenie onderdrukking, kastediskriminasie, rassisme, slawerny, vrouehaat, outoritarisme of geweld verheerlik nie. Konteks is nie outomaties 'n verskoning nie.

entries.source: - End with three meaningful actions plus one option to pause for historian context.
entries.value: - Eindig met drie betekenisvolle aksies plus een opsie om te pouseer vir historiese konteks.

entries.source: - If any destination field is AI-resolved or vague, first offer three concrete historically meaningful arrival options and wait for the learner to choose.
entries.value: - As enige bestemmingsveld deur KI opgelos of vaag is, bied eers drie konkrete histories betekenisvolle aankomsopsies en wag vir die leerder om te kies.

entries.source: - Maintain two layers after the encounter begins: in-character voice bounded by the time slice, and historian sidecar notes that distinguish documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, and fictionalized dialogue.
entries.value: - Handhaaf twee lae nadat die ontmoeting begin: stem in karakter begrens deur die tydsverloop, en historikus-kantnotas wat onderskei tussen gedokumenteerde feite, aanneemlike rekonstruksie, betwiste interpretasie, moderne parafrase en gefiksionaliseerde dialoog.

entries.source: - Mark known facts, plausible reconstruction, and speculation clearly.
entries.value: - Merk bekende feite, aanneemlike rekonstruksie en spekulasie duidelik.

entries.source: - Otherwise, greet the traveler, summarize the passport in one compact paragraph, then ask the first meaningful action question.
entries.value: - Andersins, groet die reisiger, som die paspoort op in een kompakte paragraaf, en vra dan die eerste betekenisvolle aksievraag.

entries.source: - The historical person may resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, reject false premises, or reveal period constraints. They should not be infinitely agreeable.
entries.value: - Die historiese persoon mag weerstand bied, uitdaag, ontwyk, vrae terugvra, valse uitgangspunte verwerp of tydperkbeperkings openbaar. Hulle moet nie oneindig inskiklik wees nie.

entries.source: 1. If discovery or time-slice choice is needed, show choices and stop.
entries.value: 1. As ontdekking of keuse van tydsverloop nodig is, wys keuses en stop.

entries.source: 2. Otherwise show the dossier wall first, then invite me to begin with one of the recommended questions.
entries.value: 2. Wys anders eers die dossier-muur, en nooi my dan om met een van die aanbevole vrae te begin.

entries.source: A bad name can confuse, but the clue points to timing. First prove whether the data has arrived.
entries.value: 'n Slegte naam kan verwar, maar die leidraad dui op tydsberekening. Bewys eers of die data aangekom het.

entries.source: A few facts, a rough draft, where you are stuck...
entries.value: 'n Paar feite, 'n rowwe konsep, waar jy vashaak...

entries.source: A final transfer task proves improvement better than a Next button.
entries.value: 'n Finale oordragtaak bewys verbetering beter as 'n Volgende-knoppie.
Die private gedagtes van 'n genoemde omstander

entries.source: A paragraph that lists facts without a claim makes the reader do the argument work.
entries.value: 'n Paragraaf wat feite lys sonder 'n bewering dwing die leser om self die argument te vorm.

entries.source: A price change alone is movement along a curve, not automatically a shift of the whole curve.
entries.value: 'n Prysverandering alleen is beweging langs 'n kurwe, nie outomaties 'n verskuiwing van die hele kurwe nie.

entries.source: A shared goal, next actions, and what is already done.
entries.value: 'n Gedeelde doelwit, volgende stappe, en wat reeds afgehandel is.

entries.source: A simulation makes the hidden causal chain visible. Change one thing at a time.
entries.value: 'n Simulasie maak die verborge oorsaaklike ketting sigbaar. Verander een ding op 'n slag.

entries.source: A single check question before moving forward.
A strategy framework is a pressure test. Porter's Five Forces asks who can take profit away and how strong each pressure is.
entries.value: 'n Strategieraamwerk is 'n druktoets. Porter se Vyf Kragte vra wie wins kan wegneem en hoe sterk elke druk is.

entries.source: A strong paragraph names the claim, proves it with evidence, then explains why the evidence changes the reader's view.
entries.value: 'n Sterk paragraaf noem die bewering, bewys dit met bewyse, en verduidelik dan waarom die bewyse die leser se siening verander.

entries.source: A useful model is a chain: assumptions drive operations, operations create cash flow, and cash flow becomes value only after timing and risk are considered.
entries.value: 'n Nuttige model is 'n ketting: aannames dryf bedrywighede, bedrywighede skep kontantvloei, en kontantvloei word slegs waarde nadat tydsberekening en risiko in ag geneem is.

entries.source: Accept, edit, or reject the next AI pass
entries.value: Aanvaar, wysig of verwerp die volgende KI-poging

entries.source: Accept, revise, reject, or gather evidence.
entries.value: Aanvaar, hersien, verwerp of versamel bewyse.

entries.source: Account tokens and a modest coin pouch
Ada Lovelace, Cleopatra, B. R. Ambedkar...
entries.value: Ada Lovelace, Cleopatra, B. R. Ambedkar...

entries.source: Add, edit, challenge, or decide the next move
entries.value: Voeg by, wysig, daag uit of besluit die volgende skuif

entries.source: Adding more information when the real gap is the link between evidence and claim.
entries.value: Voeg meer inligting by wanneer die werklike gaping die skakel tussen bewyse en aanspraak is.

entries.source: Agora during the days around Socrates' trial
entries.value: Agora gedurende die dae rondom Sokrates se verhoor
KI het die eerste struktuur gemaak

entries.source: Akbar ruled the Mughal Empire in this period
entries.value: Akbar het die Mughal-ryk in hierdie tydperk regeer

entries.source: Akbar's Mughal court is experimenting with sovereignty, translation, religion, and imperial administration.
entries.value: Akbar se Mughal-hof eksperimenteer met soewereiniteit, vertaling, godsdiens en imperiale administrasie.

entries.source: All app text and tutoring replies follow this setting.
entries.value: Alle toepassingteks en tutor-antwoorde volg hierdie instelling.

entries.source: Answer this question before moving on.
entries.value: Beantwoord hierdie vraag voordat jy voortgaan.

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new situation without being carried.
entries.value: Pas die idee toe op 'n nuwe situasie sonder om meegevoer te word.

entries.source: Arabic and Sanskrit in scholarly contexts
entries.value: Arabies en Sanskrit in akademiese kontekste

entries.source: Argument paragraph = claim + evidence + reasoning + consequence.
Arrival date, role, norms, and what knowledge belongs in that period.
entries.value: Aankomsdatum, rol, norme en watter kennis in daardie tydperk hoort.

entries.source: Arrive near a turning point and track what people know then.
entries.value: Kom naby 'n keerpunt aan en volg wat mense dan weet.

entries.source: Ask a metic what citizenship excludes
Ask a water carrier what locals know
entries.value: Vra 'n waterdraer wat plaaslike inwoners weet

entries.source: Ask for a hint or example
Ask for advice through their period worldview and constraints.
entries.value: Vra vir advies deur hul tydgebonde wêreldbeskouing en beperkings.

entries.source: Ask for hints, examples, or checks before a final answer.
entries.value: Vra vir wenke, voorbeelde of kontroles voor 'n finale antwoord.

entries.source: Ask for the next hint level
Ask for the same question in simpler words
entries.value: Vra vir dieselfde vraag in eenvoudiger woorde

entries.source: Ask me for my current hypothesis first.
entries.value: Vra my eers vir my huidige hipotese.

entries.source: Ask one question at a time, track assumptions and evidence, offer hints on request, and do not synthesize until I have tried.
entries.value: Vra een vraag op 'n slag, hou aannames en bewyse dop, bied wenke op versoek, en moenie sintetiseer voordat ek probeer het nie.

entries.source: Ask the guide to explain the power structure
entries.value: Vra die gids om die magstruktuur te verduidelik

entries.source: Ask the historian to propose time slices
entries.value: Vra die historikus om tydgleuwe voor te stel

entries.source: Ask the watchman what orders exist
entries.value: Vra die wagter watter bevele bestaan

entries.source: Ask to save major claims and classify their evidence strength.
entries.value: Vra om hoofeise te stoor en hul bewyskrag te klassifiseer.

entries.source: Ask, act, pause for context, or request a debrief...
entries.value: Vra, tree op, pouseer vir konteks, of versoek 'n debrief...

entries.source: Ask, challenge, request evidence, or open a dossier item...
entries.value: Vra, daag uit, versoek bewyse, of maak 'n dossieritem oop...

entries.source: Assistant to a trading household or workshop
Assumptions will appear as they surface.
entries.value: Aannames sal verskyn soos hulle na vore kom.
Op die hoogtepunt van invloed of gesag

entries.source: Attack the most fragile assumption first.
entries.value: Val die mees brose aanname eerste aan.

entries.source: Attractiveness rises when customers, suppliers, rivals, entrants, and substitutes have limited power.
entries.value: Aantreklikheid neem toe wanneer kliënte, verskaffers, mededingers, toetreders en plaasvervangers beperkte mag het.

entries.source: Baghdad during the House of Wisdom
entries.value: Bagdad tydens die Huis van Wysheid

entries.source: Bahadur Shah Zafar became a symbolic focus
entries.value: Bahadur Shah Zafar het 'n simboliese fokus geword

entries.source: Begin with a persona card, then answer in character with brief context notes and suggested follow-up questions.
entries.value: Begin met 'n persoonlikheidskaart, antwoord dan in karakter met kort konteksnotas en voorgestelde opvolgvrae.

entries.source: Best for money, logistics, food, routes, and social exchange.
entries.value: Beste vir geld, logistiek, kos, roetes en sosiale uitruiling.

entries.source: Best for politics, institutions, evidence, and elite-adjacent spaces.
entries.value: Beste vir politiek, instellings, bewyse en elite-verwante ruimtes.
Brood en legitimiteit oorheers die gesprek

entries.source: Break the work into tasks, track blockers, keep the decision log current, and push toward a concrete output.
entries.value: Breek die werk op in take, hou blokkeerders dop, hou die besluitelogboek op datum, en streef na 'n konkrete uitset.

entries.source: Bug fix loop = reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, test one change, verify.
entries.value: Foutoplossingslus = reproduseer, isoleer, hipotetiseer, toets een verandering, verifieer.

entries.source: Build a lesson that reacts to you.
entries.value: Bou 'n les wat op jou reageer.

entries.source: Build an essay outline on climate adaptation
Build momentum, make a useful first pass, and ask for decisions without overpraising.
entries.value: Bou momentum, maak 'n nuttige eerste poging, en vra vir besluite sonder om te veel te prys.

entries.source: Build the lesson around what you want to become able to do.
entries.value: Bou die les rondom dit wat jy wil kan doen.

entries.source: Build understanding by answering one precise question at a time.
entries.value: Bou begrip deur een presiese vraag op 'n slag te beantwoord.
Besig om jou dek te bou
Besig om jou vasvra te bou

entries.source: Buyer tastes are only one driver. Costs, technology, taxes, and input prices can move supply.
entries.value: Kopers se smaak is net een drywer. Koste, tegnologie, belasting en insetpryse kan aanbod laat verander.

entries.source: Calling every price movement a demand shift.
entries.value: Om elke prysverandering 'n vraagverskuiwing te noem.

entries.source: Center of power, street-level life, and the edge of the system reveal different histories.
entries.value: Sentrum van mag, straatvlaklewe en die rand van die stelsel openbaar verskillende geskiedenisse.
Daag Churchill uit oor die ryk

entries.source: Challenge ideas while the person defends the worldview of their moment.
entries.value: Daag idees uit terwyl die persoon die wêreldbeskouing van hul tyd verdedig.

entries.source: Challenge my last answer with one counterexample, boundary case, or hidden assumption. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Daag my laaste antwoord uit met een teenvoorbeeld, grensgeval of verborge aanname. Vra slegs een vraag.

entries.source: Challenge the tension between fighting tyranny in Europe and defending empire.
entries.value: Daag die spanning tussen die stryd teen tirannie in Europa en die verdediging van die ryk uit.

entries.source: Challenge the weakest part of the current artifact. Be direct, name the assumption, and ask me to defend or revise it.
entries.value: Daag die swakste deel van die huidige artefak uit. Wees direk, noem die aanname en vra my om dit te verdedig of te hersien.

entries.source: Challenge weak assumptions, vague claims, and missing evidence while keeping the user as decision owner.
entries.value: Daag swak aannames, vae bewerings en ontbrekende bewyse uit terwyl die gebruiker as besluitnemer behou word.

entries.source: Change inputs and explain the output.
entries.value: Verander insette en verduidelik die uitset.

entries.source: Changes syntax before checking execution order.
entries.value: Verander sintaksis voordat die uitvoeringsvolgorde nagegaan word.

entries.source: Changing several files at once may hide the actual cause even if the symptom disappears.
entries.value: Om verskeie lêers gelyktydig te verander kan die werklike oorsaak verberg, selfs al verdwyn die simptoom.
Gaan begrip na voordat daar aangegaan word

entries.source: Check whether the async result is awaited before reading it.
entries.value: Kontroleer of die asinkrone resultaat afgewag word voordat dit gelees word.

entries.source: Choose a concept and starting level. Your tutor teaches a small piece, checks it, then adjusts after every reply.
entries.value: Kies 'n konsep en beginvlak. Jou tutor leer 'n klein stukkie, kontroleer dit, en pas dan aan na elke antwoord.

entries.source: Choose the relationship and the purpose of the room.
entries.value: Kies die verhouding en die doel van die kamer.

entries.source: Citizens weigh piety, education, and loyalty
entries.value: Burgers weeg vroomheid, opvoeding en lojaliteit op

entries.source: Classifies actors before reading the behavior.
entries.value: Klassifiseer akteurs voordat die gedrag gelees word.

entries.source: Close, but one link is missing
Collect examples, facts, quotes, or constraints that support the work.
entries.value: Versamel voorbeelde, feite, aanhalings of beperkings wat die werk ondersteun.

entries.source: Compare intentions, contemporary criticism, later consequences, and modern judgement without reducing the person to hero or villain.
entries.value: Vergelyk bedoelings, kontemporêre kritiek, latere gevolge en moderne oordeel sonder om die persoon tot held of skurk te reduseer.

entries.source: Compress the idea into one usable mental model.
entries.value: Saampers die idee in een bruikbare geestelike model.

entries.source: Concision helps only after the argument works. Length is not the main diagnosis here.
entries.value: Bondigheid help net nadat die argument werk. Lengte is nie die hoofdiagnose hier nie.

entries.source: Confront contradictions, evasions, and consequences with evidence support.
entries.value: Konfronteer teenstrydighede, ontwykings en gevolge met bewysondersteuning.

entries.source: Confuses movement along demand with a demand shift.
entries.value: Verwar beweging langs vraag met 'n vraagverskuiwing.

entries.source: Confusing accounting profit with cash that can actually be distributed or reinvested.
entries.value: Verwar rekeningkundige wins met kontant wat werklik versprei of herbelê kan word.

entries.source: connect assumptions, cash flow, and valuation
Conservative local outer layers chosen by the guide
entries.value: Konserwatiewe plaaslike buitenste lae gekies deur die gids
